title: Reach
excerpt: Reach is the distance from which a creature can affect a target with a close-quarters attack or similar direct interaction.
markdown:
# Reach

Reach is the distance from which a creature can directly affect a nearby [[target]] with a close-quarters attack or another contact-based interaction.

## Rules Use

Reach determines whether a target is close enough for a melee attack, a grab, a physical strike, or another effect that depends on being adjacent or nearly adjacent.

## Changing Reach

A creature's normal reach can be extended by a weapon, anatomy, effect, size relationship, or another rule that changes how far its close-range influence extends.

## Related Concepts

- [[reach_property|Reach Property]] is one common rule that extends reach through a weapon
- [[opportunity_attack|Opportunity Attacks]] depend on whether another creature leaves the range your reach currently covers
